concept.core_loop: One-thumb: drag to glide a small forest-spirit around an autumn glade. Each second you choose a path — dart toward glowing seeds (score + a streak combo) or peel away from roaming thorn-sprite hazards that drift toward you. Collecting seeds without being hit builds a streak that boosts score; one hit ends the run (tap to restart). Difficulty ramps every ~12s: hazards spawn more often and drift faster, up to a cap. The live decision is risk/reward pathing — grab the seed tucked next to a hazard, or play safe.
mechanics: streak/combo reward beat (consecutive seeds without a hit -> score multiplier)
difficulty ramp (spawn rate + hazard speed tiers, capped)
game over on hazard contact + tap-to-restart
concept.art_direction: Representational PAINTERLY/illustrated forest creatures — this is the M1.5 RASTER target (NOT geometric/SVG): a soft rounded forest-spirit, organic thorn-sprite hazards, glowing seed-motes, an autumn-forest backdrop. Builder placeholder (primitives, to be raster re-skinned later): warm autumn palette — amber/rust/gold creatures and bright gold seed-circles on a deep forest-green field; soft rounded blobs for the spirit and hazards (organic, not sharp/geometric); parallax bands of darker tree-silhouette shapes drifting behind for depth; feedback beats: gentle warm pulse + scale-pop on seed pickup, red flash + screen shake on a hit.
concept.differentiation_notes: Not a third runner and not the top-down shooter: a calm-but-tense forage with risk/reward pathing and no weapons. The real hook is being the set's first REPRESENTATIONAL/painterly title (M1.5 raster) — its creatures and foliage are exactly the art SVG does badly, so it is the right proof target for the raster method.

theme.premise: a cozy autumn-woodland folktale of a small forest spirit foraging glowing seeds
theme.setting: dappled autumn forest at golden hour

visual_system.form: soft rounded painterly storybook creatures; deliberate silhouette contrast between the smooth round amber hero and the spiky bristled dark hazard so threat reads at a glance
visual_system.shading: painterly soft-brushwork with soft diffuse magical lighting on the creatures; flat dark procedural field + parallax tree silhouettes behind
visual_system.scale: 1024 square masters for spirit + hazard, downscaled at runtime to ~110px / ~92px footprints; mipmaps on, LINEAR_WITH_MIPMAPS filtering, lossless compression (2 sprites)
visual_system.prompt_scaffold: painterly storybook illustration, soft hand-painted brushwork, cozy childrens book art, warm autumn woodland palette of amber rust and gold, soft diffuse magical lighting, single centered subject, full body, clean transparent background, high detail,

style.style_prompt: painterly storybook illustration, soft hand-painted brushwork, cozy childrens book art

asset_pass.notes: Style A (painterly/warm-woodland) raster re-skin via ComfyUI + SDXL Juggernaut v9 + LayerDiffuse (RGBA). spirit + hazard are raster sprites drawn via draw_texture_rect in the existing immediate-mode _draw() (z-order, screen-shake, squash/stretch preserved for free; glow halos kept as procedural juice except the hazard halo, removed because a small primitive halo behind the larger sprite read as an odd disc). MIXED-METHOD by deliberate choice: the seed stays a primitive glow-mote — across 4 attempts SDXL over-elaborated a 14px pulsing dot (autumn-leaf scene -> wreath -> hanging ornament -> row of blobs); a procedural glow halo + bright core + white sparkle + pulse is the higher-quality pickup and is what immediate-mode does best. The parallax tree background also stays procedural (depth/motion, not a hero asset). Iteration: spirit accepted on pass 1; hazard took 3 passes (cute-fox-with-ground-shadow -> hollow thorn-wreath -> solid spiky thorn-critter). Visual-verified by composing a play frame with a SceneTree screenshot harness (real Vulkan renderer on the RTX 5080). Selftest still SELFTEST OK; headless run clean; logic untouched. STATUS HELD AT validated (validated->styled is illegal): awaits owner ~60s playtest -> playable, then human A/B + IP-safety -> styled. IP-safety: generic descriptors only, no franchise/character/studio names; every recipe negative excludes logo/watermark/text/trademarked-character/brand/celebrity.

recipes.name: spirit
recipes.prompt: painterly storybook illustration, soft hand-painted brushwork, cozy childrens book art, warm autumn woodland palette of amber rust and gold, soft diffuse magical lighting, single centered subject, full body, clean transparent background, high detail, a small round cute glowing forest spirit creature, fluffy amber body, big friendly eyes, gentle soft inner glow, adorable
recipes.negative: logo, watermark, text, signature, frame, border, trademarked character, brand, celebrity likeness, multiple characters, photo, photograph, realistic, blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, ugly, mutated

recipes.name: hazard
recipes.prompt: painterly storybook illustration, soft hand-painted brushwork, cozy childrens book art, warm autumn woodland palette of amber rust and gold, soft diffuse magical lighting, single centered subject, full body, clean transparent background, high detail, a small round menacing thorn monster, compact solid spiky ball-shaped creature densely covered in sharp rust-red and charcoal thorns, two glowing angry yellow eyes in the center, bristling spikes, dangerous bramble beast, floating isolated
recipes.negative: logo, watermark, text, signature, frame, border, ring, wreath, circle, hollow, crown, donut, trademarked character, brand, fox, cute, fluffy, soft fur, ground, floor, shadow, autumn leaves, scene, photo, photograph, realistic, blurry, low quality, deformed

recipes.name: collect
recipes.prompt: soft bright bell chime pickup, single short pluck, warm gentle woodland, magical sparkle
recipes.negative: music, melody, loop, voice, speech, noise

recipes.name: streak
recipes.prompt: bright ascending magical shimmer, short rising sparkle, warm celebratory

recipes.name: gameover
recipes.prompt: soft low gentle descending tone, muted woodland thud, melancholy chime fade
recipes.negative: music, loop, voice, speech, harsh, bright

recipes.name: bgm
recipes.prompt: gentle looping forest ambient pad, warm organic woodland atmosphere, soft sustained strings and soft flute texture, calm peaceful
recipes.negative: voice, speech, lyrics, vocals, drums, percussion, hard beat

audio_pass.notes: Warm woodland audio identity (style A). 3 SFX one-shots + 1 looping ambient bed, generated via Stable Audio Open (WAV, soundfile patch). Wired in code (_setup_audio); selftest Test 5 asserts collect/streak/gameover cues fire + nodes exist; headless run clean. STAGED pending owner gates: ~60s playtest (validated->playable) then audio A/B (->scored). No artist/track names used; music negative excludes vocals (IP-safe).

store_pass.notes: M2 foundation PROOF EXERCISE — tooling run against the validated substrate to confirm the seam executes + CI-checkable gate assertions pass. NOT packaged: creature-0001 is validated; both asset_pass + audio_pass are present but their owner A/B confirmations (and the cross-modal cohesion A/B) are still pending, and validated->packaged is illegal. icon_master derived from the styled spirit sprite; final icon/splash art is the deferred owner aesthetic A/B. APK build = the deferred Android-toolchain feasibility gate (ANDROID_HOME unset).
